name: Polenta/Cornmeal Mush
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons butter or margarine (up to 4 tbsp), melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease the walls of a Crock-Pot with 1 tablespoon of melted butter.
2. Add paprika and a dash of cayenne pepper to the greased pot.
3. Turn the settings to High while measuring out the remaining ingredients.
4. Add the remaining melted butter, cornmeal, salt, and boiling water to the Crock-Pot.
5. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover the Crock-Pot and cook on Low for 6 to 9 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours, stirring occasionally.
Serves 8 to 10.
